subject: January 20, 2017
body:
Dearest Jeffrey,

HAPPY HAPPY HAPPY HAPPY!!!

AND, YOUR BIRTHDAY PRESENT IS.....PRESIDENT DONALD TRUMP!! HA HA!

<image>

LOVE & KISSES

BE for your BBB!

---
**Barbro C. Ehnbom**

Chairman, Swedish-American Life Science Summit
